sources.name: PalworldSaveTools: fast_travel_points.json
contradictions: The prior audit excluded WatchTower_* records as non-transfer destinations; a Palworld 1.0 in-game check on 2026-07-14 confirmed that Windswept Island Watchtower exposes Transfer and reveals map coverage.
